queries.question: Who featured in the movie with the most acts?
queries.sql: SELECT name FROM Movie JOIN Role ON Role.movie_id = Movie.id JOIN Actor ON Actor.id = Role.actor_id ORDER BY Number_of_acts DESC LIMIT 1;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?movie a :Movie .
  ?role a :Role .
  ?role p:hasMovie ?movie .
  ?actor a :Actor .
  ?role p:hasActor ?actor .
  ?actor p:name ?name .
  ?movie p:Number_of_acts ?number_of_acts_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?number_of_acts_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: Which actor starred in the film with the highest runtime and most acts?
queries.sql: SELECT name FROM Movie JOIN Role ON Role.movie_id = Movie.id JOIN Actor ON Actor.id = Role.actor_id ORDER BY Total_length, Number_of_acts DESC LIMIT 1;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?movie a :Movie .
  ?role a :Role .
  ?role p:hasMovie ?movie .
  ?actor a :Actor .
  ?role p:hasActor ?actor .
  ?actor p:name ?name .
  ?movie p:Total_length ?total_length_o .
  ?movie p:Number_of_acts ?number_of_acts_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?total_length_o) DESC(?number_of_acts_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: Which actor starred in the movie which has the longest length?
queries.sql: SELECT name FROM Movie JOIN Role ON Role.movie_id = Movie.id JOIN Actor ON Actor.id = Role.actor_id ORDER BY Total_length DESC LIMIT 1;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?movie a :Movie .
  ?role a :Role .
  ?role p:hasMovie ?movie .
  ?actor a :Actor .
  ?role p:hasActor ?actor .
  ?actor p:name ?name .
  ?movie p:Total_length ?total_length_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?total_length_o)
LIMIT 1

ambiguous_dsl.question: Who played in the longest movie?
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  component: { SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?movie a :Movie .
  ?role a :Role .
  ?role p:hasMovie ?movie .
  ?actor a :Actor .
  ?role p:hasActor ?actor .
  ?actor p:name ?name .
  ?movie p:Number_of_acts ?number_of_acts_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?number_of_acts_o)
LIMIT 1 }
  full: { SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?movie a :Movie .
  ?role a :Role .
  ?role p:hasMovie ?movie .
  ?actor a :Actor .
  ?role p:hasActor ?actor .
  ?actor p:name ?name .
  ?movie p:Total_length ?total_length_o .
  ?movie p:Number_of_acts ?number_of_acts_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?total_length_o) DESC(?number_of_acts_o)
LIMIT 1 }
  component_2: { SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?movie a :Movie .
  ?role a :Role .
  ?role p:hasMovie ?movie .
  ?actor a :Actor .
  ?role p:hasActor ?actor .
  ?actor p:name ?name .
  ?movie p:Total_length ?total_length_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?total_length_o)
LIMIT 1 }
}
